question: Will kkr win ipl 26
reason: KKR's poor start and inconsistent performance make their chances of winning the 2026 IPL final very low.
evidence: KKR lost five of their first six matches, including a 65-run defeat to Sunrisers Hyderabad.
The team finished eighth in the league stage, missing the playoffs for the second consecutive year.
KKR's squad faced challenges with player fitness and availability, affecting their overall performance.
